title: CoolNightSky
description: A plugin to make nights more pleasant with Shooting Stars/Falling Stars and constellations
body:
CoolNightSky, aims to provide a better experience at Minecraft (MC) servers nights.

Installation requires no configuration changes, but you can tune it at your will.
With demonstrationMode (default true for new installations).

If not in demo mode, rules are based in real life events for the 8 main meteor shower events.

Also includes meteorites, comets, ISS and some constellations (WIP).

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/R-9JMHz8EQE" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

Compatibility with Paper, Folia and Spigot servers, but with better efects on the first two.
